basics.name: Justin Loi
basics.label: Student
basics.summary: I am studying for a B.S. in Computer Science and minoring in Business at the University of Hawaii. I expect to graduate in Spring, 2023.

courses: BUS 310: Statistic Analysis for Business Decisions
BUS 311: Information Systems for Global Business Environment
BUS 315: Global Management and Organizational Behavior

highlights: Assist with developing and maintaining the Manoa Now websites and mobile applications for UH Student Media.
Maintain close communication with the marketing & sales team to design online solutions and campaigns for clients and to ensure a smooth implementation of web products.
Assist with production requests, design elements, content management and various other digital duties as applicable.
Implement designs to the minimum viable product mobile application using Flutter and Firebase.
Contribute feedback about the design of the minimum viable product’s user interface.
Sort pills
create labels
Greet customers
Ring up purchases
Operate drive-thru window

work.summary: Educator at the Kumon Learning Center, located in Kaimuki.
highlights: Collaborate with students to complete homework assignments, identify lagging skills, and correct weaknesses.
Improve test scores by focusing on reading comprehension, math, and critical thinking skills through one-on-one tutoring sessions.
Utilize different strategies to complement student's learning style.

volunteer.summary: Member of ACM at University of Hawaii at Manoa
highlights: Attend Grey hats and PANDAs workshops
Network with other Computer Science major peers

volunteer.summary: Vice-chairperson for Pacific Asia Travel Association
highlights: Assist the Chairperson in execution of his/her duties.
Help officers on help planning for the school year.
Present for recruitment during the first weeks of the semester.

volunteer.summary: Assisting Teaching Assistant for the course ICS 111: Introduction to Computer Science I for Fall 2021
highlights: Assisted students with questions regarding homework and course material during recitation class and open hours
Led recitation class
